title: ALL THINGS ARE YOURS
speaker: Pr Samuel Isiko
description: ALL THINGS ARE YOURS With Pr Samuel Isiko at CHRIST REVOLUTION MINISTRIES

title: The Kingdom of God
speaker: Pastor Samuel Isiko
description: Have you ever wondered the dynamics of the Kingdom of God, how the spiritual dominion is set up and what goes on in the spiritual dominion? Pastor Sam, unveils the mysteries hidden in the dynamics in the spiritual domains.  Ref: Daniel 10:12-13

title: WALKING IN THE POWER OF GOD
speaker: PR.ISIKO SAMUEL
description: knowing your position as a joint heir with Jesus Christ

title: Walking In The Power Of The Kingdom Press-In
speaker: Pr. Samuel Isiko

title: The Just Shall Live By Faith.
speaker: Pr. Isiko Sam
description: Live by faith and not by sight

title: The Just Shall Live By Faith part 2
speaker: Pr. Samuel Isiko
description: This sermon emphasizes that living by faith is a proactive lifestyle that transcends physical circumstances, requiring believers to see beyond the natural eye. Pr. Samuel Isiko teaches that true faith is manifested through the four pillars of conviction, meditation, confession, and corresponding actions.
